final:
module top_module(
  input [7:0] num1,
  input [7:0] num2,
  input [7:0] num3,
  input [7:0] num4,
  output reg [7:0] min_val
);always @(*) begin
  min_val = num1; // Start with num1 as the initial minimum
  if (num2 < min_val) min_val = num2;
  if (num3 < min_val) min_val = num3;
  if (num4 < min_val) min_val = num4;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (num1 > num2) begin
        min_val = num2;
      end
      if (num3 > num4) begin
        min_val = num4;
      end
      if (min_val < num3) begin
        min_val = num3;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
